case_title: FRANCISCO EMILIO GOMEZ VELASQUEZ VS. STEVEN EUGENE PEDIGO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELASQUEZ, FRANCISCO EMILIO GOMEZ AS TO DEFENDANT PEDIGO, STEVEN EUGENE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELASQUEZ, FRANCISCO EMILIO GOMEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEDIGO, STEVEN EUGENE $10,939.47 PRINCIPAL, $435.73 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,745.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
